coach_quote: I built this system because I watched brands waste hundreds of thousands on shoots and influencers every year. AI can replace all of it — and I'm teaching you exactly how.
coach_role: AI Content Creation Expert · [X]+ Brands Trained

testimonials.name: [Student Name]
testimonials.text: Before this mentorship, I was spending over Rs. 80,000 per shoot. Now I create unlimited AI product photos myself in hours. The ROI is insane.

testimonials.name: [Student Name]
testimonials.text: The AI influencer module alone was worth 10x the price. I created a branded spokesperson for my client in a single afternoon. They were blown away.

testimonials.name: [Student Name]
testimonials.text: My product listings used to look amateur. Now they look like premium brand shoots — all done with AI tools I learned in Week 1.

testimonials.name: [Student Name]
testimonials.text: I now offer AI content creation as a service to 3 ecom brands. The mentorship basically gave me a new income stream I didn't have before.

testimonials.name: [Student Name]
testimonials.text: We used to outsource content creation. Now our team creates everything in-house using AI. Costs dropped, turnaround dropped, quality went up.

testimonials.name: [Student Name]
testimonials.text: The AI voice cloning + avatar combo changed everything for our video ads. We now produce video content weekly instead of quarterly.

testimonials.name: [Student Name]
testimonials.text: The 1-on-1 calls are what make this different. I'm not watching tutorials and guessing — I get direct answers for my specific situation every week.
